summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 4.8 (Microstructure Entry) and Phase 4.8.1 (Microstructure Integration) - all 20 backend API tests passed with 100% success rate
passed_tests: Microstructure Health - version 4.8, 5 engines (liquidity, orderbook, imbalance, absorption, sweep)
Mock Supportive - ENTER_NOW, entry_permission:true, score >= 0.75
Mock Hostile Spread - SKIP_HOSTILE_SPREAD, entry_permission:false
Mock Sweep Risk - WAIT_SWEEP, entry_permission:false, sweep_risk >= 0.7
Mock Liquidity Cluster - WAIT_LIQUIDITY_CLEAR, entry_permission:false, liquidity_risk >= 0.7
Full Custom Evaluation - all fields (symbol, side, price, orderbook, liquidity, flow, execution_context)
Scenarios List - 4 scenarios (supportive, hostile_spread, sweep_risk, liquidity_cluster)
Simulate All - results for all 4 scenarios
Stats Endpoint - returns statistics
History Endpoint - returns history entries
Integration Health - version 4.8.1, features include microstructure
Integration Decisions - includes GO_FULL and WAIT_MICROSTRUCTURE
Integration GO_FULL - GO timing + supportive micro yields GO_FULL
Integration WAIT_MICROSTRUCTURE - GO timing + sweep risk micro yields WAIT_MICROSTRUCTURE
Backward Compatible - without mtf/microstructure fields still works as GO/GO_REDUCED/WAIT/SKIP
SKIP Preserved - SKIP timing preserved even with supportive micro
MTF Health - Phase 4.7 endpoint still works (version 4.7)
MTF Mock Aligned - Phase 4.7 endpoint returns ENTER_AGGRESSIVE
Wrong-Early Summary - Phase 4.1-4.6 endpoint still works
Mode Types - Phase 4.1-4.6 endpoint still works
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4.8 Microstructure Entry and Phase 4.8.1 Integration with Microstructure are fully tested and working. All 5 microstructure engines (liquidity, orderbook, imbalance, absorption, sweep) are operational. Integration layer correctly merges timing decisions with microstructure data, producing GO_FULL when aligned and WAIT_MICROSTRUCTURE when micro blocks. Backward compatibility with Phase 4.1-4.7 endpoints is preserved.
